item.title: Andrew Ng: AI's Instagram Problem
item.description: Ref: https://web.archive.org/web/20230924131456/https://www.deeplearning.ai/the-batch/someone-elses-cool-ai-project-doesnt-make-your-project-less-valuable/ Judge your projects according to your own standard, and don’t let the shiny objects make you doubt the worth of your work! I think of 2 things when I read this article: FOMO due to the latest fashionable trend is not worth it. I have read and realised it through Taleb’s writings as well. One of the most important characteristics of the 21st century (atleast my generation) is the ability to learn, adapt and relearn new skills; especially my skillsets a tech worker.
